name: Haut à Courroies leather handbag
description:
A timeless classic with understated power, this Hermès HAC 32 (Haut à Courroies) is a rare and highly sought-after piece from 1995, showcasing the heritage and craftsmanship the house is known for.
Crafted from luxurious brown Taurillon Clémence leather, the bag features a soft, slightly slouchy structure with a beautifully grained texture that is both durable and elegant. Originally designed as a larger, more relaxed alternative to the Birkin, the HAC offers a refined yet effortless silhouette that transitions seamlessly from day to travel.
The bag is accented with classic Hermès hardware, dual rolled handles, and the signature front flap with sangles and turn-lock closure, embodying the brand’s iconic design language. Its 32 cm size makes it practical for everyday use while still maintaining a statement presence.
Rich in character and history, this vintage Hermès piece from 1995 is perfect for collectors and those who appreciate authentic luxury with a story to tell. Hardware tarnished, leather aging, stains inside, wear on corners.
SKU006000
